name: Fudge Truffle Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups (12 oz. package) Semi-sweet chocolate chips
3 packages (8 oz. each) cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate chips, stirring constantly.
3. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Beat in the sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
5. Add the melted chocolate chips and remaining ingredients (eggs, vanilla extract) to the bowl with the cream cheese mixture.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared cookie crust.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 5 minutes, or until the center is set.
